title: After the Queen Elizabeth II Cup: Wow!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I can't believe it, but I win the race!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Of course, I only won because of how much
Trainer did for me.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
But Trainer keeps saying it's because of how
amazing I am. In the end, we compromise and
give each other a victory bouquet! ♪
